name: wilson-lsp
description: LSP servers for the dancinlab formats: .hexa (wires the first-class `hexa lsp`), and minimal spec-grounded diagnostics servers for .tape / .n6 / .hxc / .kosmos (bundled, no deps). Each is graceful: if its binary is absent ( .hexa needs `hexa` on PATH ) Claude Code just surfaces it in the /plugin Errors tab.
